features.description: API GET /api/v1/tables returns table data from ClickHouse instead of 501

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -c 'pub async fn tables(' src/server/routes.rs && grep -c 'pub struct TablesResponseEntry' src/server/routes.rs && ! grep -q 'tables_stub' src/server/routes.rs && echo PASS
layers.fail_message: tables() handler or TablesResponseEntry not found, or tables_stub still present

layers.name: compilation
layers.fail_message: Compilation errors after tables endpoint changes

layers.name: behavioral
layers.fail_message: Tables endpoint test failed

layers.name: runtime
layers.fail_message: Tables endpoint not logging expected pattern

features.description: API POST /api/v1/restart reloads config and reconnects instead of 501

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -c 'pub async fn restart(' src/server/routes.rs && grep -c 'pub struct RestartResponse' src/server/routes.rs && ! grep -q 'restart_stub' src/server/routes.rs && echo PASS
layers.fail_message: restart() handler or RestartResponse not found, or restart_stub still present

layers.name: compilation
layers.fail_message: Compilation errors after restart endpoint changes

layers.name: behavioral
layers.fail_message: Restart endpoint test failed

layers.name: runtime
layers.fail_message: Restart endpoint not logging expected pattern

features.description: --skip-projections filters .proj directories during backup shadow walk

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -c 'skip_proj' src/backup/collect.rs && ! grep -q 'skip-projections flag is not yet implemented' src/main.rs && echo PASS
layers.fail_message: Projection filter not in collect.rs or warning still in main.rs

layers.name: compilation
layers.fail_message: Compilation errors after skip-projections changes

layers.name: behavioral
layers.fail_message: Skip projections tests failed

layers.name: runtime
layers.fail_message: Projection filtering not active in runtime logs

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -c 'fn find_existing_part' src/download/mod.rs && ! grep -q 'hardlink-exists-files flag is not yet implemented' src/main.rs && ! grep -q 'hardlink_exists_files flag is not yet implemented' src/server/routes.rs && echo PASS
layers.fail_message: find_existing_part not in download/mod.rs or warning still in main.rs or routes.rs

layers.name: compilation
layers.fail_message: Compilation errors after hardlink-exists-files changes

layers.name: behavioral
layers.fail_message: Hardlink dedup tests failed

layers.name: runtime
layers.fail_message: Hardlink dedup not active in runtime logs

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -c 'indicatif' Cargo.toml && grep -c 'pub struct ProgressTracker' src/progress.rs && grep -c 'mod progress' src/lib.rs && echo PASS
layers.fail_message: indicatif not in Cargo.toml or ProgressTracker not in progress.rs or module not declared

layers.name: compilation
layers.fail_message: Compilation errors after progress module added

layers.name: behavioral
layers.fail_message: ProgressTracker tests failed

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: ProgressTracker is a library struct; runtime testing covered by F005b

features.description: Progress bar wired into upload and download pipelines

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -c 'ProgressTracker' src/upload/mod.rs && grep -c 'ProgressTracker' src/download/mod.rs && echo PASS
layers.fail_message: ProgressTracker not used in upload or download modules

layers.name: compilation
layers.fail_message: Compilation errors after progress bar wiring

layers.name: behavioral
layers.fail_message: Progress-related tests failed

layers.name: runtime
layers.fail_message: Progress tracking not active in runtime logs

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -c 'fn exit_code_from_error' src/main.rs && grep -c 'process::exit' src/main.rs && echo PASS
layers.fail_message: exit_code_from_error or process::exit not found in main.rs

layers.name: compilation
layers.fail_message: Compilation errors after exit code changes

layers.name: behavioral
layers.fail_message: Exit code mapping tests failed

features.description: API list response threads metadata_size from manifest through BackupSummary

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -A20 'pub struct BackupSummary' src/list.rs | grep -q 'metadata_size' && grep -c 'summary.metadata_size\|s\.metadata_size' src/server/routes.rs | awk '{if ($1 >= 1) print "PASS"; else print "FAIL"}'
layers.fail_message: metadata_size not in BackupSummary struct or not read in summary_to_list_response()

layers.name: compilation
layers.fail_message: Compilation errors after BackupSummary metadata_size changes

layers.name: behavioral
layers.fail_message: BackupSummary metadata_size tests failed

layers.name: runtime
layers.fail_message: metadata_size not visible in list response runtime

features.description: CLAUDE.md updated for all modified modules (server, backup, download, root)

layers.name: structural
layers.command: test -f src/server/CLAUDE.md && test -f src/backup/CLAUDE.md && test -f src/download/CLAUDE.md && test -f CLAUDE.md && echo PASS
layers.fail_message: One or more CLAUDE.md files missing

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: grep -q 'Parent Context' src/server/CLAUDE.md && grep -q 'Directory Structure' src/server/CLAUDE.md && grep -q 'Key Patterns' src/server/CLAUDE.md && grep -q 'Parent Context' src/backup/CLAUDE.md && grep -q 'Parent Context' src/download/CLAUDE.md && echo VALID
layers.fail_message: CLAUDE.md missing required sections

features.description: No 501 stubs remain and no 'not yet implemented' warnings for plan items

layers.name: structural
layers.command: ! grep -q 'tables_stub\|restart_stub' src/server/routes.rs && ! grep -q 'skip-projections flag is not yet implemented' src/main.rs && ! grep -q 'hardlink-exists-files flag is not yet implemented\|hardlink_exists_files flag is not yet implemented' src/main.rs src/server/routes.rs && echo CLEAN
layers.fail_message: Stubs or not-yet-implemented warnings still present

layers.name: compilation
layers.fail_message: Clippy errors after all changes

layers.name: behavioral
layers.fail_message: Overall test suite failed

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Cleanup verification - runtime covered by individual feature criteria
